# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Serverless Event Processing Architecture - SQS Queue and SNS Topic Setup
  with secure configurations for pub/sub messaging

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    Description: Environment name for resource tagging

  MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1209600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 14 days)

  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds (default 5 minutes)

  MaxReceiveCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 100
    Description: Max receive count before sending to DLQ

  KMSKeyAlias:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/event-processing-key
    Description: Alias for the KMS key used for encryption

Resources:

  EventProcessingKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting SQS and SNS messages
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: event-processing-key-policy
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSServiceUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: AllowSQSServiceUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  EventProcessingKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Ref KMSKeyAlias
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EventProcessingKMSKey

  EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EventProcessingKMSKey
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 86400
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Dead Letter Queue for failed event processing

  EventProcessingDeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sqs:*'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyNonAccountAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sqs:*'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      DelaySeconds: 0
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EventProcessingKMSKey
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 86400
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: !Ref MaxReceiveCount
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Main event processing queue

  EventProcessingQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sqs:*'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowSNSToSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: AllowAccountQueueOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-topic'
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EventProcessingKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Pub/Sub topic for event distribution

  EventProcessingTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sns:*'
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowAccountPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountManagement
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
              - sns:GetTopicAttributes
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: DenyNonHTTPSSubscriptions
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sns:Subscribe'
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sns:Protocol: http

  EventProcessingSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn

  DLQAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-dlq-messages-alarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when messages appear in the dead letter queue
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  QueueDepthAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-queue-depth-alarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when main queue depth exceeds threshold
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      Threshold: 10000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  EventProcessingQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the main event processing SQS queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueUrl'

  EventProcessingQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the main event processing SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueArn'

  EventProcessingQueueName:
    Description: Name of the main event processing SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueName'

  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DeadLetterQueueUrl'

  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DeadLetterQueueArn'

  EventProcessingTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingTopicArn'

  EventProcessingTopicName:
    Description: Name of the SNS topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingTopicName'

  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for encryption
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingKMSKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingKMSKeyArn'
